_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: Doc-generation jobs abort on missing editorial guide and the failure is invisible on the Docs page

steps.description: Fix #1: DocService._effective_guide falls back to get_type_guide('_default') when neither an instance guide nor a doc_type-keyed guide exists. Fix #2: update skills/iw-doc-generator/SKILL.md and skills/iw-doc-system/SKILL.md 'Job lifecycle' sections — null section_guides_snapshot/guide_snapshot is normal; proceed using the skill's static references/…-guidelines.md; abort with --error only on a non-zero 'iw doc-job-status' exit

Per-agent review of S01: _default fallback correctness and resolution order (instance -> doc_type -> _default), no behaviour change for docs that already have a guide, skill-doc wording is unambiguous, no scope creep

Fix #3: docs_running_jobs also returns DocGenerationJobs that finished in status=failed within ~10 min; fragments/docs_running_jobs.html renders failed jobs as a dismissible red row carrying the error; docs_library.html gains a docJobFailed listener showing a persistent toast/banner

Per-agent review of S03: query widening is bounded (recently-failed only) and ordered sensibly, fragment markup/JS correct and idempotent (no duplicate EventSource for failed rows), docJobFailed listener present on the catalogue page, no Jinja2 format-filter pitfalls, no scope creep

Reproduction tests: _effective_guide returns the _default guide when no instance/doc_type guide exists (unit, tests/unit/test_doc_type_guide_service.py); create_doc_job snapshots that guide for a diagram doc (integration, tests/integration/test_doc_type_guides.py or tests/integration/test_i00077_doc_job_editorial_fallback.py). Regression tests: docs_running_jobs includes a recently-failed job and the fragment marks it distinctly with a dismiss control; docs_library.html includes a docJobFailed handler (tests/dashboard/test_docs_running_jobs.py)

Per-agent review of S05: reproduction tests genuinely fail pre-fix and pass post-fix, semantic assertions (not shape-only), CSS-class assertions attribute-scoped, test isolation, correct test-dir placement (dashboard tests under tests/dashboard/)

Cross-agent global review: AC1-AC4 trace, the doc-job-context path (create_doc_job -> doc-job-status JSON -> agent) re-traced end to end, catalogue vs detail page consistency, no scope creep, full test suite
QV: Linting (ruff + dashboard JS + Jinja2 template check)

QV: Browser verification — seed a failed DocGenerationJob via an e2e fixture; confirm /project/<id>/docs surfaces it persistently (red dismissible row + error); successful/running jobs still behave; no regressions
Self-assessment of the just-completed item via the iw-item-analyze skill
